summary: Project-level Claude instructions: active technologies placeholder, project structure (.specify/, features/), commands (specify check, specify --help), command surface rules (treat live specify --help as authoritative), code style (follow existing conventions), workflow recovery rules (lane-first not branch-first, durable lane state), Spec Kit Plus managed rules ([AGENT] markers), always-on context (project cognition and memory available), workflow recommendations (sp-discussion, sp-specify, sp-deep-research, sp-debug), durable state rules.
